/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/stadium_server.dir/src/Actions.cpp.o CMakeFiles/stadium_server.dir/src/Bookings.cpp.o CMakeFiles/stadium_server.dir/src/Main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/stadium_server.dir/src/Stadia.cpp.o -o stadium_server  /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libsqlite3.tbd
